communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Georgia Open Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

I respectfully request access to and copies of all records related to the procurement of all school bus stop-arm camera contracts and amendments which includes the following:

-The total number of buses in their fleet;
-The total number of buses serving special needs students;
-The total number of buses installed with a stop arm camera system; and
-The total number of buses serving special needs students installed with a stop arm camera system.

Thank you for your attention to this matter. I look forward to you acknowledgement.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 3 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 3 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Jon Smith

communications.subject: Virginia Freedom of Information Act Request: Financial Status Records
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Virginia Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

Records of the Supplementary budget information from the VMI Operating budget as of June 30, 2021, 2022, 2023, 2024, and current as of the date of this request, to include, without limitation, the actual "key Financial Balances" for the VMI General Endowment, VMI Collins Endowment, Peay Endownment, Auxiliary Fund Balance, and Local unrestricted fund balance. In addition, I am requesting the goal to maintain the Auxiliary fund balance published by VMI as approved by the BOV, and the auxiliary fund balance guidance from the State Budget guidance for those years. Up until June 30, 2020, the operating budgets published on your website included this information (see attached). However, the versions for the requested years only contain "estimated" figures, not actual figures, and much of the other data is omitted. Whereas up until the years indicated, all these records were a standard part of VMI's published operating budget, they should be readily available within the 5-day limit of the FOIA and not require any significant search.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Tom Nash, a citizen of Virginia, in coordination with Anonymous.
